scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:extension
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter mcp-chrome-lite-shared build && pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:extension
scripts.clean:modules: pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:modules
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && cd server && go test ./...
